prompt: List all service accounts (UID less than 1000) from /etc/passwd and display their names and shells.

create_files.content:
root:x:0:0:root:/root:/bin/bash
daemon:x:1:1:daemon:/usr/sbin:/usr/sbin/nologin
bin:x:2:2:bin:/bin:/usr/sbin/nologin
sys:x:3:3:sys:/dev:/usr/sbin/nologin
www-data:x:33:33:www-data:/var/www:/usr/sbin/nologin
postgres:x:105:109:PostgreSQL administrator:/var/lib/postgresql:/bin/bash
nobody:x:65534:65534:nobody:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin
appuser:x:1000:1000:App User:/home/appuser:/bin/bash
devuser:x:1001:1001:Dev User:/home/devuser:/bin/bash
